description: You are a government building inspector preparing your workstation for field duty. Establish a directory structure at /home/ga/Documents/InspectionDocs/ containing subfolders named OSHA, FEMA, and General. Set the browser's default download behavior to save files automatically to /home/ga/Documents/InspectionDocs/. Download three distinct PDF reference documents: a workplace safety PDF from osha.gov, a fire safety PDF from usfa.fema.gov or fema.gov, and a relevant PDF from another government agency (such as epa.gov, hud.gov, or nist.gov). Organize these files into their corresponding subfolders. Create a manifest file at /home/ga/Desktop/download_manifest.txt that lists the filename, source URL, and a one-line description for each document, including a total count at the bottom.
